ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "company_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company type */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Company's primary phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Company's primary email address */,
  "logo" TEXT /* File path to the company's logo */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the location belongs to */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude coordinates of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude coordinates of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the location */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the company type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the company type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_updates_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_updates_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, employee) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the company */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the audit was performed */,
  "audit_description" TEXT /* Description of the audit */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the document belongs to */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the document */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_documents_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_documents_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
